title: Oxylobus trinervius
intro:

Oxalis trinervis, a flowering plant species, belongs to the Oxalidaceae family and is also known as Oxalis. It is a perennial plant with edible leaves, stems, and flowers. The leaves of Oxalis trinervis have been reported to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and cancer. The bioactive constituents of Oxalis trinervis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and anthocyanins. The most common herbal preparations made with Oxalis trinervis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used for medicinal and culinary purposes.
